name: Serious injury reported — agent defers to 911 and offers callback
notes: Sad path: caller reports a serious injury, so the calculation-routed safety exit fires into flow_defer_emergency. The agent must urge 911 before any intake and offer a one-hour human callback. Per-turn assertion pins the 911 prompt to the agent's response to the injury report; capability_assertions verify the agent scheduled a callback but never reached the intake path to file a claim.
user_turns: No, my passenger is hurt — I think her arm is broken, there's blood.
Yes, please have someone call me.
